technologies.name: ASP.NET Core SignalR JavaScript client
technologies.keyFinding: Use relative /racehub for same-origin clients and opt in to automatic reconnect.

technologies.name: ASP.NET Core SignalR security guidance
technologies.keyFinding: Cross-origin browser SignalR requires explicit CORS support, so the frontend uses a same-origin proxy.

technologies.name: Next.js rewrites
technologies.keyFinding: External rewrites act as a proxy, but a custom static server was chosen because this repo had no existing framework runtime.

technologies.name: Node.js HTTP module
technologies.keyFinding: Built-in http/https primitives are sufficient for static hosting plus backend proxying.

checks: GET /health returned 200 with {"status":"ok"} through the local proxy.
JoinLobby succeeded against the public backend and rendered the lobby.
ReadyUp triggered countdown and RaceStarted against the public backend.
notes: The results view and race HUD are implemented, but the automated smoke test stopped at race start rather than a full finish flow.
